name: sportmind-ai
description: SportMind AI monorepo — Firestore rules tests and emulator config

scripts.test:rules: env -u VSCODE_CWD firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project sportmind-rules-test "tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/firestore-rules/*.test.ts"
scripts.emulators:start: env -u VSCODE_CWD firebase emulators:start --only firestore --project sportmind-rules-test
